apps.name: YouTube+
apps.versionDescription: [STABLE ytp-16] YouTube 21.15.5 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent). Built 2026-05-16T02:27:49Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Enhanced YouTube iOS client: ad blocking, Picture-in-Picture, Return YouTube Dislikes, quality selection, and more. Built from the dayanch96/YTLite project via Jake's YTLite_v5.2o fork. Rebuilt periodically as decrypted IPAs refresh.

apps.name: YT-diag
apps.versionDescription: [DIAG ytp-diag-4] YouTube 21.15.5 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent). NSLog capture build — filter Console.app by YTLite-DIAG. Built 2026-05-16T06:39:12Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Diagnostic build of YouTube+. Identical features to the stable entry, plus a temporary NSLog hook that prints cell class info to the iOS system log (filter Console.app by YTLite-DIAG) so the maintainer can identify how YT 21.x labels shorts shelves. Different bundle id from the stable build — both can be installed side by side.
